channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Pope Leo urges Trump to end war on Iran
item.description: Pope Leo XIV has urged US President Donald Trump to find an “off-ramp” from the US and Israel’s war on Iran.

item.title: After Strait of Hormuz opens, turmoil would still last months, analysts say
item.description: Effective shutdown of key waterway could lead to permanent changes in how shipping industry does business.

item.title: US exempts Gulf of Mexico oil drillers from endangered species protections
item.description: The Trump administration says protections would diminish US energy competitiveness amid the ongoing war on Iran.

item.title: EU warns oil and gas prices won’t quickly return to normal after Iran war
item.description: The EU’s energy commissioner has warned oil and gas prices will not return to normal any time soon.

item.title: Iran ambassador refuses to leave Lebanon despite expulsion order
item.description: Lebanon has ordered Iran’s ambassador to leave the country, but he has refused to go.

item.title: Israeli air attack kills father and two-year-old son in Gaza
item.description: A father and his two-year-old son were amongst six people killed by Israeli forces in Gaza on Tuesday.

item.title: How Pakistan positioned itself at the center of global crisis management
item.description: Pakistan has emerged as a global crisis mediator amid the US war on Iran.

item.title: What’s behind Donald Trump’s interest in Iran’s Kharg Island?
item.description: The US president is threatening to take over Iran's oil export hub or destroy it.

item.title: Analysis: Hezbollah backs Iran ambassador as conflict deepens Lebanon rifts
item.description: Lebanon’s expulsion of Iranian ambassador tests limits of state power as Hezbollah fights push for disarmament.

item.title: Iran’s FM confirms contact with US envoy Witkoff, denies talks under way
item.description: Iran's top diplomat Araghchi has told Al Jazeera that, despite contacts, Iran is not in negotiations with the US.
